summary: Iteration 33 Testing - Operator Geography Integration. All requested features tested and VERIFIED WORKING. Backend APIs accept country/region/market_segment fields. Frontend table shows Location column with geography info. Create/Edit dialogs have working Country/Region/Segment dropdowns with proper defaults. Detail view shows geography info. Fixed a critical bug where Edit dialog crashed due to SelectItem value mismatch.

issues: Pre-existing: Notifications API fails with AxiosError (HTTP instead of HTTPS)

operators_table_location_column.location_header_present: PASS - Location column visible in table header

create_operator_dialog.country_options: PASS - Shows 6 countries: Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Nigeria
create_operator_dialog.region_filters_by_country: PASS - Selecting Nigeria shows 'Select region' (no Nigeria regions)

edit_operator_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Click edit icon opens dialog

view_operator_detail.dialog_opens: PASS - Click view icon opens detail panel

backend_api_tests.GET_geography_regions: PASS - Returns regions filtered by country

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Edit Operator dialog crashed with React SelectItem error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: 1) Select value set to empty string '' when SelectItem also had value='' disabled option. 2) Operator country stored as 'Cameroon' (full name) but Select expected 'CM' (code)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix_applied: Changed Select value='' to value=undefined for empty values. Changed disabled SelectItem value from '' to '__none__'. Added country normalization in handleEdit()

action_items: Consider data migration to convert operator country from full name ('Cameroon') to ISO code ('CM') in MongoDB for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: OperatorsManagement.jsx line 129-145: handleEdit now normalizes country name to code with fallback mapping
OperatorsManagement.jsx line 649: Fixed Region SelectItem value from '' to '__none__' to prevent crash
Backend operator model correctly accepts country/region/market_segment fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 tested operator geography integration. All 6 operators have country='Cameroon' (full name, not code). The Edit dialog was crashing due to SelectItem value issues - fixed by using undefined instead of '' for empty Select values. Create form defaults: country=CM, segment=sme. Geography API has 6 countries and 10 Cameroon regions.
rca_of_the_issue: The Edit Operator dialog crash was caused by two issues: (1) RadixUI Select component crashes when value prop is set to a value that doesn't exist in SelectItem options - operators had country='Cameroon' but SelectItems used codes like 'CM'. (2) SelectItem with value='' combined with Select value='' causes component conflict. Fix: normalize country in handleEdit using a name-to-code mapping, use undefined instead of '' for empty Select values.
